MOORE
SOME EXPERTS SPECULATE THAT MOORE'S LAW WILL EVENTUALLY CEASE AS WE APPROACH PHYSICAL LIMITS IN TRANSISTOR MINIATURIZATION DUE TO QUANTUM EFFECTS AND HEAT DISSIPATION ISSUES.
***
OTHER ANALYSTS ARGUE THAT THE LAW WILL NOT TRULY STOP BUT RATHER EVOLVE THROUGH NEW MATERIALS AND ARCHITECTURES THAT SUSTAIN COMPUTING GROWTH BEYOND SILICON CONSTRAINTS.
